items.title: Your aging parent has a new romance. Here’s how to protect your inheritance — without looking greedy.
items.description: Before your single mom or dad remarries, talk with them about estate-planning issues.

items.title: This threat to the chip rally has surged to its highest level since 2015
items.description: Volatility threatens top gainers including AMD and Micron.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs were supposed to make selloffs less painful. That theory is being put to the test.
items.description: Crypto investors had hoped that increased institutional adoption and a crypto-friendly administration could help the largest cryptocurrency avoid the painful cycles it once experienced.

items.title: Nike earnings crushed Wall Street’s estimates — but here’s the catch
items.description: Nike’s profit and gross margins were buoyed by a tariff refund.

items.title: ‘She is retired’: Do I dip into my 401(k) to pay my mother’s $30,000 credit-card debt?
items.description: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt.”

items.title: Trump discloses expanding financial empire, including Apple stock, celebration coins and crypto
items.description: The president’s new annual filing is nearly four times as lengthy as last year’s disclosure and shows crypto income in the hundreds of millions

items.title: If LeBron James goes to the Warriors, that team’s roster will be stacked with some of the most expensive players in NBA history
items.description: LeBron James’s agent has told the Los Angeles Lakers that he intends to sign with a new team, according to a new report.

items.title: Investors piled into ETFs at a record pace in the first half of 2026. Here’s where their money is flowing.
items.description: Investors have poured money into exchange-traded funds at a rapid pace in the first half of 2026, demonstrating an unrelenting appetite for stocks associated with the AI theme.

items.title: Trump’s energy secretary says global warming is ‘no big deal.’ Meanwhile, a heat emergency is striking the U.S.
items.description: Government scientists warn people to stay indoors this weekend as temperatures in many areas could reach triple digits

items.title: Will the Comcast-NBCU spinoff pay off for investors? Here’s what history has to say.
items.description: Comcast says splitting its cable and broadband business from NBCUniversal will unlock value for both businesses — but media spinoffs historically have resulted in mixed outcomes.
